title: Themes & Vibe Coding
excerpt: This Question started due to the lack of variety in theme integration, I have a coworker that made a non dynamic board of his have ghost fly around and be spooky for the month of October. Now I looked on the App market p…

posts.author: cardinals6 (Tyler)
posts.cookedHtml:
This Question started due to the lack of variety in theme integration, I have a coworker that made a non dynamic board of his have ghost fly around and be spooky for the month of October. Now I looked on the App market place and there is no such tool. I tried the vibe coding and created a wonderful feature add on with a little icon that lets u drop down into a toggle on off automated changing theme selector with 16 holiday themese that are toggleable to be apart of the list that will change throughout the year, each theme has a color change and roughly two animations that go across the screen reappearing like ghosts and pumpkins.

That is basically the prompt after a few iterations. What is frustrating is there is no way to privately deploy this for use without what appears to be an account upgrade of $100 a month so I can make 10 apps…. I only want this one basic add on that is hard to argue is worth $100 or $1200 upgrade to just make this one app. Their ai vibe assistant swears I should be able to deploy it privately without publishing it but I see no option and it seems to then go agianst that after I tell it my options on the screen.

Is there no way for me to privately deploy my theme changer>>? If there is not could someone out there who can publish apps make this and call it holiday theme selector in the app marketplace?

Thank you!

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml:
With monday vibe, you can have unlimited in ‘draft’ mode ie not actually active. This is for testing/creating it. If you publish it to your account, that makes it active and is where the charge comes into play. Here’s a link to the vibe article

https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us/articles/28451758349842-Create-code-free-custom-apps-with-monday-vibe

posts.author: cardinals6 (Tyler)
posts.cookedHtml: Understood… sadly the price structure doesn’t make sense for me to share this app with the community or my tvs. If a dev sees this perhaps, they could consider this 5 minute upgrade implementation. I was inspired due to the current “Theme” options only containing, white/black/or night, more like basic browser themes. This took hardly any effort to add 16 holidays with auto changing themes throughout the year. Anyways enjoying monday.com
